name: Ravioli with Ricotta Filling
recipeInstructions:
BASIC PASTA DOUGH
1. In a large bowl, mix together 4 cups sifted flour and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing slightly after each addition.
4. Gradually add about 6 tablespoons very cold water.
5. Mix to form a stiff dough.
6. Turn onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 3 to 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
RICOTTA FILLING
1. In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients.
ASSEMBLY
1. Divide the dough into fourths.
2. Lightly roll each portion about 1/8 inch thick and cut lengthwise into 5-inch wide strips.
3. Place 2 teaspoons of filling about 1 1/2 inches from the narrow end and in the center of each strip.
4. Continue along the strip, placing filling at about 3 1/2 inch intervals.
5. Fold the strip in half lengthwise, covering the mounds of filling.
6. Press edges together with the tines of a fork to seal.
7. Press gently between the mounds to form rectangles about 3 1/2 inches long.
8. Cut apart with a pastry cutter and press cut edges with the tines of a fork to seal.
COOKING
1. In a large saucepan, bring 7 quarts water and 2 tablespoons salt to a boil.
2. Add ravioli about half at a time.
3. Boil rapidly, uncovered, for about 20 minutes or until tender.
4. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain.
5. Place on a warmed platter and top with tomato sauce.
6. Sprinkle with grated romano or parmesan cheese.
Makes about 3 dozen ravioli.
